name: Supabase
description: Manage Supabase projects, query data, generate types, and run migrations
longDescription: Official Supabase MCP server for managing your projects, querying databases with SQL, generating TypeScript types from schema, running migrations, and accessing realtime subscriptions. Supports both OAuth and Personal Access Token authentication.
author: Supabase

apiKeyConfig.label: Supabase Personal Access Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a PAT at supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens with required scopes

examplePrompts: Run a SQL query on my production database
Generate TypeScript types for the users table
Show me the schema for the orders table
Create a migration to add a new column
Get the anon key for my project
